## Summary

Describe the software and statistical changes.

## Validation

- [ ] I added or updated tests.
- [ ] I updated roxygen2 documentation.
- [ ] I ran `devtools::document()`.
- [ ] I ran `devtools::test()`.
- [ ] I ran `devtools::check(args = "--as-cran")`.
- [ ] I updated `NEWS.md` when user-visible behaviour changed.

## Reproducibility and compatibility

State any effect on seeds, numerical results, stored objects, or existing user
code. Confirm that no confidential data or credentials are included.
